excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Electronic Engineering lists 2nd round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-10-27. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 29 September 2025 (Mon) 2nd round: 27 October 2025 (Mon) 3rd round: 24 November 2025 (Mon) 4th round: 12 January 2026 (Mon) 5th around: 16 March 2026 (Mon) 6th around: 27 April 2026 (Mon) Please refer to the website of the Division for the latest application deadline. Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
